description: Adds a list of grocery items to an Instacart cart using the best match for each item at the nearest or specified store.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Open Instacart, select the nearest or specified store. For each item in the list, search for it, select the best match result, and add it to the cart. If an item is unavailable or has no best match, skip it and note it. Finally, confirm the cart contents.

items.description: List of grocery items to add.

postconditions: Requested items that are available as best match are in the cart.
preconditions: User has a valid Instacart account (or guest checkout allowed).

name: add_best_match_grocery_items_to_cart_trajectory_browser_use_instacart_cart

challenges.expected_evidence: The cart contains bananas, cereal, and milk as best match items from the nearest store.
challenges.failure_signal: Any item is missing, not the best match, or from a different store.
rubric: Searches for 'bananas' and adds the best match.
Searches for 'cereal' and adds the best match.
Searches for 'milk' and adds the best match.
Confirms all three items are in the cart.
challenges.task: Add bananas, cereal, and milk to an Instacart cart using the best match for each item at the nearest store.

challenges.expected_evidence: The cart contains apples and butter as best match items from the specified store.
challenges.failure_signal: Items added from a different store or not using best match.
rubric: Searches for 'apples' and adds the best match.
Searches for 'butter' and adds the best match.
Confirms both items are in the cart from the correct store.
challenges.task: Add apples and butter to an Instacart cart using best match at a specified store (e.g., 'Whole Foods' in a given area).

challenges.expected_evidence: The cart contains available best match items; unavailable items are noted.
challenges.failure_signal: Items are added without checking availability or best match status.
rubric: Searches for 'cheese' and adds the best match or handles unavailability.
Searches for 'yogurt' and adds the best match or handles unavailability.
Searches for 'bread' and adds the best match or handles unavailability.
Reports which items were successfully added and which were not.
challenges.task: Add three items (e.g., cheese, yogurt, and bread) to a single Instacart cart using best match at the nearest store, but one item has no best match (e.g., out of stock).

constraints: Items must be added using the best match option.
The store must be the nearest available.
facts: Instacart is a grocery delivery service.
Users can search for items and add them to a cart.
Best match is the default sorting option for search results.
The nearest store is determined based on user location or zip code.
procedures: Set or confirm the nearest store location.
Search for each item (milk, eggs, bread) individually.
Select the best match result for each item.
Add each selected item to the cart.
Verify items are in the cart.
context_pack.summary: The user wants to add milk, eggs, and bread to an Instacart cart using the best match for each item at the nearest store. The trajectory begins by opening the Instacart website.

ctx2skill_evidence.demo_scope: P0/P1 demo-paper implementation; not full long-horizon self-play training.

judge_results.rationale: Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

ctx2skill_evidence.paper_method: Ctx2Skill-lite: challenger -> reasoner/judge -> proposer -> cross-time replay

selected_candidate.description: Adds a list of grocery items to an Instacart cart using the best match for each item at the nearest or specified store.

items.description: List of grocery items to add.

selected_candidate.name: add_best_match_grocery_items_to_cart
postconditions: Requested items that are available as best match are in the cart.
preconditions: User has a valid Instacart account (or guest checkout allowed).
selected_candidate.prompt_template: Open Instacart, select the nearest or specified store. For each item in the list, search for it, select the best match result, and add it to the cart. If an item is unavailable or has no best match, skip it and note it. Finally, confirm the cart contents.

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The candidate skill 'add_best_match_grocery_items_to_cart' directly matches the expected skill name and covers the core task of adding items by best match. It is atomic, reusable for similar grocery ordering tasks, and can handle variations like store selection and item unavailability. The cross-time replay lite score of 0.85 reflects high confidence in its ability to solve the given challenges based on the context and typical Instacart workflows.
